Table DCS_SEASURVEY

Card of table DCS_SEASURVEY

Name

DCS_SEASURVEY

Code

DCS_SEASURVEY

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_SEASURVEY

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_INTERACTION" schema

called "DCS_SEASURVEY".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(SEA_SURVEY_ID, MARKET_CODE))

 

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

 

6. The data in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

APPEND

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_SEASURVEY

CKT_DCS_SEASURVEY


Server validation rule of the table DCS_SEASURVEY

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_SEASURVEY

drop table DCS_SEASURVEY cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_SEASURVEY
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY (
DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY TEXT not null,
SEA_SURVEY_ID INTEGER not null,
STAFF_ID INTEGER,
USER_ID TEXT,
DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
TOUCHPOINT_ID INTEGER,
DATE DATE,
SESSION_ID TEXT,
COMPANY_ID INTEGER,
CONFIGURATION TEXT,
SURVEY TEXT,
SURVEY_TYPE TEXT,
SURVEY_ID TEXT,
HOSTESS_ID TEXT,
NAME TEXT,
POS TEXT,
TIMESTAMP TEXT,
SURVEY_DATA TEXT,
PRODUCT_IDS TEXT,
GENDER TEXT,
AGE_RANGE TEXT,
AGE INTEGER,
MAIN_BRAND TEXT,
AGEPOSITIVE_LAS_CONTACT TEXT,
NEGATIVE_LAS_CONTACT TEXT,
AWARE_OF_IQOS TEXT,
DEMO TEXT,
NO_DEMO TEXT,
PURCHASE TEXT,
NO_PURCHASE TEXT,
FEEDBACK_DEMO TEXT,
STAFF_EMAIL TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_SEASURVEY primary key (DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.STAFF_ID is
'DCS user unique identifier of backend user that placed the order';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.USER_ID is
'User identifier';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.TOUCHPOINT_ID is
'ID of the touchpoint (POS) assigned to the activity';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.SESSION_ID is
'ID of the session assigned to the activity on the device';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.COMPANY_ID is
'Store / Company identifier';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.SURVEY_ID is
'Survey identifier';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.HOSTESS_ID is
'Hostess identifier';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.NAME is
'Survey name';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.POS is
'If customer registered through hostess form - Store location name - code';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.TIMESTAMP is
'System timestamp';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.GENDER is
'Customer gender (3 - female, 4 - male)';

comment on column PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY
add constraint FK_DCS_SEAS_R34_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (USER_ID)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY
add constraint FK_DCS_SEAS_R49_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (DCS_USER_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
